title_header: Omniscient Reader, Episode 3, Chapter 1: The Beginning of the Paywall Part 2

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: MURMUR MURMUR

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The police...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The police aren't picking up! What do we do?

dialogue.speaker: KIM DOKJA
dialogue.line: Sangah, stay calm.

dialogue.speaker: KIM DOKJA
dialogue.line: Sangah, you've played the game the development team is currently working on, right? You know, the one where only a handful of people survive the apocalypse.

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH
dialogue.line: What's that got to do with anything?

dialogue.speaker: KIM DOKJA
dialogue.line: Think of it this way: We're part of that game now.

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH
dialogue.line: A game...?

dialogue.speaker: KIM DOKJA
dialogue.line: It is simple. Every game has rules: we just need to follow them.

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH
dialogue.line: Rules? What are you-?

dialogue.speaker: KIM DOKJA
dialogue.line: We just have to figure out what those rules are.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A Dokkaebi with antennae.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A litter of dead bodies in the subway cabin.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Trembling office workers covered in blood.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: An old lady praying fervently in her seat.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I still couldn't believe this was really happening.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But I couldn't deny it any longer. No, I have no choice but to admit it now.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Someone please open the door!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: BANG

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Try breaking it with a hammer!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I don't know why, but it was clear that 'Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse,' which I've been reading for over ten years, was coming to life right before my eyes.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Think...

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SIGH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: What do I need to do... to survive?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MAIN SCENARIO #1 [PROVE YOUR VALUE] KILL ONE OR MORE LIVING ORGANISMS: CATEGORY: MAIN DIFFICULTY: F TIME LIMIT: 30 MINUTES REWARD: 300 COINS PENALTY FOR FAILURE: DEATH

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG LEE
dialogue.line: Okay, everyone! Calm down. Take a deep breath, and stop what you're doing. Have you all calmed down? May I have your attention for a moment?

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG LEE
dialogue.line: As you all know, in a national emergency such as this one, even a small commotion can lead to heavy casualties. So, from now on, I will take charge of this situation.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What? Who the hell are you?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: A national emergency? What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'm... what?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Public Official Hyeonseong Lee, Ministry of Defense. An Army Lieutenant, currently serving in Unit 6502.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: MURMUR

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: A Lieutenant?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: MURMUR

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's from the military.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: MURMUR

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG LEE
dialogue.line: I just received a message from my unit: 'NATIONAL LEVEL ONE EMERGENCY ALERT: PLEASE RETURN TO YOUR UNIT ASAP. THIS IS NOT A DRILL.' Oh my God.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: A n-national emergency?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, Army man! What in the world is going on?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'm trying my best to contact the army base but...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What about the Blue House?! Contact the President right this minute!

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG LEE
dialogue.line: I'm sorry, but I'm just a soldier, so I don't have clearance to contact the Blue House directly.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Then how on earth are you going to control this situation?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I already knew this would turn into a national emergency, so I wasn't surprised.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It was something else that took me by surprise.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: For everyone's safety... 'Lieutenant Hyeonseong Lee.' I know him. I've never seen him in person, but I knew him by name.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Steel Blade Hyeonseong Lee, Republic of Korea Army Lieutenant.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He was one of the supporting characters in TWSA. It's hard to believe a character from TWSA has actually appeared.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He talks just like he does in TWSA. But... was this how Hyeonseong Lee was introduced in the original story?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SCRATCH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: No, I was absolutely certain that this was not how Hyeonseong Lee first appeared in the story.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He originally appeared after the first scenario. Then... what is going on?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: If I could just read it again, I would know exactly what's happening.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The Prime Minister is making a speech! It really is a Level One National Emergency!

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH
dialogue.line: Dokja, look.

dialogue.speaker: PRIME MINISTER
dialogue.line: Dear citizens of Korea... There have been reports of unidentified terrorist attacks in Seoul as well as many other areas of the country. The government will combat these attacks using all means necessary.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: This was also in the story. Yes, it would be easier to believe that we're under a terrorist attack. But now that I'm actually hearing it, it sounds ridiculous.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: But why is the Prime Minister making the speech? What happened to the President?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Apparently, the terrorists already got him.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What? Really?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I don't know. I saw it in the comments section of the video.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Then it's just a groundless rumor!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It's not just a groundless rumor. And soon...

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: BANG

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: BANG

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Eek!

dialogue.speaker: PRIME MINISTER
dialogue.line: The P-Prime Minister...

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: I already told you: This is not just some joke.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: I guess you still don't get it, do you? No, this won't do. Do you think we're playing a game right now? Fine. According to my research, people from this country are good at games. Then, let's raise the difficulty, shall we?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SQUEEZE

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Aah!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: TWOOSH

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: KWOOSH

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That is...?!

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: The remaining time has been reduced. You now have ten minutes left.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MAIN SCENARIO #1 [PROVE YOUR VALUE] KILL ONE OR MORE LIVING ORGANISMS: CATEGORY: MAIN DIFFICULTY: F TIME LIMIT: 10 MINUTES REWARD: 300 COINS PENALTY FOR FAILURE: DEATH

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: As an added penalty, if the first death does not occur within the next five minutes, every living organism in this cabin will be terminated.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: W-What kind of a sick joke is this?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Did you hear what that thing just said? Did you?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Army man?! What do we do now? Where are the police?!

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG LEE
dialogue.line: Everyone, please calm down and listen to me.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SQUEEZE

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Yes, everything is going exactly as I remember it. The events are unfolding exactly the same as the beginning of TWSA, but I can't help but feel that something isn't right.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Hyeonseong Lee, one of the major supporting characters, has already appeared, but why hasn't he appeared yet?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: If I remember correctly, he should be making an appearance any minute now.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Eek!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Someone has been murdered in the cabin behind us!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ahhh! Don't let them come in! Don't let anyone through! We have to block the--

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: BANG

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: BANG

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SPARK

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ah!!!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: W-What is wrong with this? There's some kind of invisible wall in front of the door.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: [NO ONE MAY ENTER OR LEAVE THE CABIN UNTIL THE SCENARIO IS COMPLETE.]

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Haha, it is getting interesting for some cabins, while others haven't even started yet.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: Fine, I'll give you a little jolt to get the... How about showing you what will happen if you don't do anything in the next five minutes?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SNAP

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: FLASH

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Huh...?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That is Taepung Girls' High School!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: BEEP

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRASH

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: YOU HAVE EXCEEDED THE TIME LIMIT. PROCEEDING WITH CHECKOUT.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SPLATT

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SHUT

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ahhh! H-Help me! Ahh! Let me out! Let me-

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SPLAT

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: No!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SPLAT

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ahhh! Oh my gosh, how could they...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: TEAR

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ah... Argh!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: TREMBLE

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: HUFF

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: HUFF

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: The survivor of Channel #BAY23515 is... JiHye Lee, a second-year student from Class B at Taepung Girls' High School.

dialogue.speaker: DOKKAEBI
dialogue.line: He he he he. What do you think? Fun, right?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: BREAK

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SNEAK

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: F**k! What is this?! What the hell?!

summary: Passengers on a subway train realize they are trapped in a deadly 'game' based on the novel 'Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse.' Lieutenant Hyeonseong Lee attempts to take charge, but a Dokkaebi announces a 'Main Scenario' requiring them to kill a living organism within a time limit, threatening mass termination if they fail. The Dokkaebi demonstrates the penalty by showing another cabin's gruesome failure, causing widespread panic and chaos as the time limit is reduced.
